name: hydrogen_storage
description: a hydrogen production/storage cycle world; actions electrolyze, store, fuel

card.description: a hydrogen production/storage cycle world; actions electrolyze, store, fuel

rules: State is conserved: H2 only moves loose -> stored -> fuel; it is never created except by 'electrolyze'.
'electrolyze' consumes 50 kWh of power and 9 L of water per kg of H2 produced, emitting 8 kg O2 per kg H2; output is capped at 2 kg/step and by available power and water.
'store' compresses loose H2 into the tank at 3 kWh/kg, capped at 5 kg/step, never exceeding tank_capacity_kg.
'fuel' dispenses stored H2 to the load at up to 3 kg/step, delivering 33.3 kWh of usable energy per kg.
No resource ever goes negative and the tank never overfills; every action advances 'step' by 1.
An action may pass params['kg'] to request a smaller batch than the per-step cap.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")
    params = action.get("params") or {}

    # --- physical constants (per kg of H2) ---
    KWH_PER_KG   = 50.0   # electricity to electrolyze 1 kg H2
    WATER_PER_KG = 9.0    # liters of water consumed per kg H2 (2 H2O -> 2 H2 + O2)
    O2_PER_KG    = 8.0    # kg O2 byproduct per kg H2 (mass ratio 16:2)
    COMPRESS_KWH = 3.0    # electricity to compress 1 kg H2 into the tank
    LHV_KWH_PER_KG = 33.3 # usable energy released per kg H2 burned/cell

    # --- per-step throughput caps (facility rates) ---
    ELECTROLYZE_RATE = 2.0
    STORE_RATE       = 5.0
    FUEL_RATE        = 3.0

    def clamp(x):
        x = round(float(x), 6)
        return 0.0 if x < 0 else x

    if name == "electrolyze":
        # H2 produced is bounded by the rate cap and by available power + water.
        cap = float(params.get("kg", ELECTROLYZE_RATE))
        made = min(cap, ELECTROLYZE_RATE,
                   s["power_kwh"] / KWH_PER_KG,
                   s["water_l"] / WATER_PER_KG)
        made = clamp(made)
        s["power_kwh"]   = clamp(s["power_kwh"] - made * KWH_PER_KG)
        s["water_l"]     = clamp(s["water_l"] - made * WATER_PER_KG)
        s["h2_loose_kg"] = clamp(s["h2_loose_kg"] + made)
        s["o2_kg"]       = clamp(s["o2_kg"] + made * O2_PER_KG)

    elif name == "store":
        # Compress loose H2 into the tank, bounded by rate, free capacity, power.
        cap = float(params.get("kg", STORE_RATE))
        headroom = s["tank_capacity_kg"] - s["h2_stored_kg"]
        moved = min(cap, STORE_RATE, s["h2_loose_kg"],
                    headroom, s["power_kwh"] / COMPRESS_KWH)
        moved = clamp(moved)
        s["h2_loose_kg"]  = clamp(s["h2_loose_kg"] - moved)
        s["h2_stored_kg"] = clamp(s["h2_stored_kg"] + moved)
        s["power_kwh"]    = clamp(s["power_kwh"] - moved * COMPRESS_KWH)

    elif name == "fuel":
        # Dispense stored H2 to the load, delivering its usable energy.
        cap = float(params.get("kg", FUEL_RATE))
        used = min(cap, FUEL_RATE, s["h2_stored_kg"])
        used = clamp(used)
        s["h2_stored_kg"]        = clamp(s["h2_stored_kg"] - used)
        s["fuel_delivered_kg"]   = clamp(s["fuel_delivered_kg"] + used)
        s["energy_delivered_kwh"] = clamp(s["energy_delivered_kwh"] + used * LHV_KWH_PER_KG)

    # any other action (incl. noop) leaves the facility idle
    s["step"] = int(s.get("step", 0)) + 1
    return s

emit.report: Hydrogen facility @ step {step}: {h2_stored_kg} kg stored of {tank_capacity_kg} kg capacity ({h2_loose_kg} kg loose). Delivered {fuel_delivered_kg} kg fuel = {energy_delivered_kwh} kWh. Reserves: {power_kwh} kWh power, {water_l} L water.
